introSection: Bruco Mela is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at EuroPark Milano Idroscalo in Lombardy, Italy. "Bruco Mela" is Italian for "Apple Worm".
fullText: Bruco Mela is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at EuroPark Milano Idroscalo in Lombardy, Italy. "Bruco Mela" is Italian for "Apple Worm".
